title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
